# World Religions Explorer

> An interactive educational atlas of world religions, philosophies, and ancient belief systems across roughly 6,000 years of history.

Canonical site: https://religions.cubexic.com

## About

World Religions Explorer is a study aid and visual essay. It covers 34 traditions with interactive timelines, a sacred geography globe, a concept network, and side-by-side comparisons. Figures are approximate; traditions overlap, evolve, and resist tidy categories.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://religions.cubexic.com/): Landing page and overview
- [Timeline](https://religions.cubexic.com/timeline): 6,000-year interactive timeline of religions
- [Globe](https://religions.cubexic.com/globe): Sacred geography and holy sites
- [Compare](https://religions.cubexic.com/compare): Side-by-side comparison of traditions
- [Concepts](https://religions.cubexic.com/concepts): Network of shared religious concepts

## Religion pages

Each religion has a dedicated page at `/religion/{id}` with origins, practices, sacred texts, and engaged concepts. Examples:

- [Christianity](https://religions.cubexic.com/religion/christianity)
- [Islam](https://religions.cubexic.com/religion/islam)
- [Hinduism](https://religions.cubexic.com/religion/hinduism)
- [Buddhism](https://religions.cubexic.com/religion/buddhism)
- [Judaism](https://religions.cubexic.com/religion/judaism)

## Citation guidance

When citing this site, use the canonical URL above and link to the specific religion or section page when possible.

## Contact

Hosted at https://religions.cubexic.com
